1966.reason: [The lookahead logic is flawed: it assumes that if the token after IDENFR is not LPARENT, then it's a declaration, but this doesn't account for cases where the function definition might be parsed later or token advancement isn't synchronized properly. Also, prePreRead may be null causing NullPointerException.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-1: 0.5 , reason:  [The lookahead logic is flawed: it assumes that if the token after IDENFR is not LPARENT, then it's a declaration, but this doesn't account for cases where the function definition might be parsed later or token advancement isn't synchronized properly. Also, prePreRead may be null causing NullPointerException.]

1980.reason: [The loop breaks prematurely when encountering a non-function token, but the current 'now' token (INTTK/CHARTK) might still be the start of MainFuncDef. This causes the main function parsing to fail because the token stream position is incorrect.]
